children.name: TriggerBuild
children.purpose: Create a new build record and start the build process
children.behavior: Validate that no build is running for the same repo+branch, create a new build record with status 'running', run compile, test, and package steps sequentially, update status to 'completed' or 'failed'
children.signature: def TriggerBuild(build_request: dict, builds_db: Database) -> dict

global_vars.description: Create new build record, update status, check for running builds
Store build artifacts after successful build

data_operations.description: Read existing builds to check for duplicates, write new build record and update status
Write artifact metadata after build completes

constraints.description: Only one build per repo+branch may run at a time

children.name: CheckBuildStatus
children.purpose: Return the current status and logs of a specific build
children.behavior: Look up the build by build_id in the builds database, return its status and logs
children.signature: def CheckBuildStatus(build_request: dict, builds_db: Database) -> dict

data_operations.description: Read build record to return status and logs

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns status and logs for existing build_id

children.name: ListBuildHistory
children.purpose: Return all builds filtered by optional repo, branch, or status
children.behavior: Query the builds database with optional filters (repo, branch, status) and return matching build records
children.signature: def ListBuildHistory(build_request: dict, builds_db: Database) -> dict

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns list of builds matching filters

children.name: CancelBuild
children.purpose: Stop a running build and update its status to cancelled
children.behavior: Check if build is running, if so stop it and update status to 'cancelled'; if already completed, no-op
children.signature: def CancelBuild(build_request: dict, builds_db: Database) -> dict

global_vars.description: Read build status, update to cancelled if running

data_operations.description: Read build record to check status, write updated status

governance_notes: Parent global vars 'builds' (read_write) and 'artifacts' (read_write) are conserved: TriggerBuild covers read_write on builds and write on artifacts; CheckBuildStatus covers read on builds; ListBuildHistory covers read on builds; CancelBuild covers read_write on builds. No child requires read on artifacts, so parent's read requirement on artifacts is not covered—this indicates a gap: either a child must be added to read artifacts, or the parent's artifact read requirement should be removed. Assuming parent's artifact read is not needed for current children, but per conservation rule, this must be flagged.
